sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei nong it man' lamdang hehpih nongpia

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hih it na hang nuam sing
Aki kilh khut te hang nuam sing
Sian thona tuitawh hong sawp hi
Hong pomna le hong maisakna tu'n thei ta'ng

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pasian'ta Zeisu pahtawi lam to un
Van ngaihno zeisu kithat lum hi
